efficacyPairs.questionText: If A=3, B=5, C=7, what is the value of A + B + C?

lessonLearningGoal: Why BODMAS (the normal maths rule) does NOT apply to letter sums — this catches loads of people!

lessonLearningGoal: Why BODMAS (the normal maths rule) does NOT apply to letter sums — this catches loads of people!
How to avoid the number one trap in letter sum questions
